summary: Iteration 4: 'Gains Backtest' feature (cumulative Рѓг/ROI in POST /api/backtest + UI chart & 4-col metrics). Backend 3/3 pytest gains tests pass + unit check of all 12 FDJ payout combinations matches spec exactly. Frontend Backtest page renders gains chart (15 bars = 5 strategies ├Ќ 3 series: green/red/amber) and 4-column breakdown (Gains bruts emerald, Co├╗t red, Net & ROI red for negative). FDJ payout disclaimer card present. Full 11-route navigation sweep: 0 pageerrors (insertBefore regression still clean). Real FDJ 1048-draw dataset produced expected all-negative ROI (-79% to -80%).
passed: Unit check of _grid_payout / _payout_rank: all 12 combos correct (5+ch=5MРѓг, 5=100kРѓг, 4+ch=1kРѓг, 4=50Рѓг, 3+ch=20Рѓг, 3=10Рѓг, 2+ch=5Рѓг, 2=2.20Рѓг, 0/1+ch=2.20Рѓг, else 0Рѓг). FDJ_GRID_COST=2.20Рѓг.
POST /api/backtest response includes top-level grid_cost=2.20 and payout_table = FDJ_PAYOUTS dict (10 entries).

Each of 5 strategies exposes gross_gains, total_cost, net_gains, roi_percent (all floats). total_cost == round(grids_tested * 2.20, 2). net_gains == round(gross_gains - total_cost, 2). roi_percent == round(net/cost*100, 2). Verified within 0.01Рѓг/0.05% tolerance.

Frontend /dashboard/backtest: 'Lancer le backtest' Рєњ renders 'R├Еsultats' card + 'Gains cumul├Еs (Рѓг)' card (data-testid=gains-chart) with 15 recharts bar rectangles (5 strats ├Ќ 3 series Gains bruts / Co├╗t / Net).

Per-strategy card shows 4-column grid (Gains bruts emerald, Co├╗t grilles red -X.XXРѓг, Net colored, ROI colored) Рђћ all 5 strategies rendered with negative net (mathematically expected on real data).
FDJ payout disclaimer card at bottom contains '5 000 000Рѓг' jackpot amount.
Header shows '{sample_size} tirages ┬и {grids_per_strategy} grilles/strat ┬и 2.2Рѓг/grille' correctly formatted.
Regression: 11-route sidebar sweep (overviewРєњhistoryРєњstatsРєњhot-coldРєњheatmapРєњgeneratorРєњbacktestРєњverifyРєњgridsРєњalertsРєњdata) produced 0 pageerrors, 0 insertBefore/NotFoundError.
Regression: /dashboard/grids page still renders (result panel + pending states).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1130 lines Рђћ still recommend splitting into modules (auth/draws/stats/backtest/alerts). Non-blocking, previously flagged.
In /backtest, the 'random' baseline strategy hardcodes wc={n:1} instead of using history chance freq Рђћ intentional to keep it truly random, but worth a code comment for future maintainers.
roi_percent could be undefined-behavior if grids_tested==0; endpoint clamps to sample>=20 and grids>=5, so cost>0 always in practice. Guard `if cost else 0.0` already present Рђћ good.
FDJ_PAYOUTS jackpot 5MРѓг is a fixed constant; real FDJ jackpots vary 2M-30M. The disclaimer text calls this out explicitly, so acceptable.
Backtest.jsx: 'Co├╗t' bar uses negative value trick to render below zero Рђћ clean visual solution. Tooltip formatter uses `${v.toFixed(2)} Рѓг` which shows the negative sign correctly.
test_credentials: session_token=test_fdj_1784196939161 (test-fdj user, 1048 FDJ draws pre-imported). Cookie or Bearer both work.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gains feature is production-ready. Backend enrichment (gross_gains/total_cost/net_gains/roi_percent + top-level grid_cost/payout_table) mathematically verified. UI renders gains chart + 4-col metrics. To rerun: TEST_TOKEN=test_fdj_1784196939161 REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest backend/tests/test_backtest_gains.py -v. Negative ROI on real data is expected (loto has -50% expected value; small samples with rare jackpot make it -75% to -90%). Do NOT flag negative ROI as a bug.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A Рђћ feature addition, no bugs found.
